creator: frank@altpeter.de
text:
Moin Edwin Groothuis,

on 2011-07-28 at 07:40:19 CEST, you wrote:
> Maintainer of net-im/centerim-devel,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/159247 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/159247
> 

I just reviewed the submitted patch and I agree.


Mit freundlichen Grüßen

	Frank Altpeter
